tasks.name: Create PresentationSummary type definition
tasks.purpose: Define the shape of presentation data displayed in the table

constraints: Optional: status field (if exists in schema)
Use Pick<> utility type from database schema

tasks.input_state: Database schema defines building_blocks_submissions table structure
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Type compiles without errors and includes all required fields for table display

tasks.name: Create loadRecentPresentations loader function
tasks.purpose: Fetch user's 10 most recent presentations from building_blocks_submissions

constraints: Filter by user_id (RLS handles this automatically)
Use subquery pattern for auth.uid(): user_id = (select auth.uid())

tasks.input_state: PresentationSummary type is defined, Supabase client available
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function fetches and returns up to 10 presentations ordered by updated_at descending
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm --filter web test:unit -- dashboard-page.loader

tasks.name: Create PresentationOutlineTable component skeleton
tasks.purpose: Setup table component with prop types and basic table structure

dependencies: Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell from @kit/ui/table
constraints: Define column headers: Title, Status, Slides, Last Updated
Empty tbody for now (will populate in T5)

tasks.input_state: PresentationSummary type exists, Table UI components available
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders table headers correctly with empty body

tasks.name: Add empty state conditional rendering

action.target: Empty state UI when presentations array is empty

tasks.purpose: Display helpful message and CTA when user has no presentations

constraints: Show card with: icon, heading, description, CTA button

tasks.output_state: Component shows empty state card when presentations array is empty
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty array renders card with 'Create Your First Presentation' CTA linking to /home/ai/blocks

tasks.name: Add table row rendering with data
tasks.purpose: Render each presentation as a table row with title and placeholder cells

constraints: Show: title, placeholder status, placeholder slides, placeholder date

tasks.input_state: PresentationOutlineTable component skeleton exists with table structure
tasks.output_state: Component renders table rows with title column populated, other columns show placeholder text
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Table displays one row per presentation with title visible

tasks.name: Add status badge rendering logic

action.target: Status badge cell with variant mapping

tasks.purpose: Display presentation status as colored badge in status column

constraints: Map status to badge variant: draft→outline, published→success, archived→secondary

tasks.input_state: Table rows render with placeholder status cells
tasks.output_state: Status column displays Badge component with appropriate variant based on presentation status
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Status badges render with correct colors: draft=outline, published=success, archived=secondary

tasks.name: Add relative date formatting

action.target: Relative time display in Last Updated column

tasks.purpose: Show user-friendly relative time (e.g., '2 hours ago') for updated_at field

constraints: Wrap in <time> element with dateTime attribute

tasks.input_state: Table rows render with placeholder date cells
tasks.output_state: Last Updated column displays relative time (e.g., '3 days ago') formatted with date-fns
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dates display as relative time strings with 'ago' suffix and use semantic <time> element

tasks.name: Add slides count display
tasks.purpose: Display number of slides in presentation (from storyboard.length or outline parsing)

dependencies: PresentationSummary type (may need to extend to include storyboard or slide_count)
constraints: Else: parse outline field or show '—'
Display as number or '—' if unavailable

tasks.input_state: Table rows render with placeholder slides cells
tasks.output_state: Slides column displays count from storyboard array length or placeholder '—'
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Slides column shows numeric count when available, otherwise shows '—'

tasks.name: Add row click navigation handler

action.target: onClick handler for table row navigation

tasks.purpose: Navigate to presentation canvas page when user clicks a table row

constraints: Add hover effect (already in TableRow styles)

tasks.input_state: Table rows render presentation data without click handling
tasks.output_state: Clicking a table row navigates to /home/ai/canvas with presentation id as query param
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Clicking any row navigates to /home/ai/canvas?id={id} using Next.js router

tasks.name: Wire table to dashboard page

action.target: PresentationOutlineTable to home page with Suspense

tasks.purpose: Integrate table component into user dashboard with loading state

constraints: Call loadRecentPresentations with client and userId
Add skeleton loader component or import from @kit/ui

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page renders with PageBody, loader function exists, table component complete
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page at /home/(user)/page.tsx renders PresentationOutlineTable with data from loader inside Suspense boundary
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Visiting /home shows table with user's presentations, shows skeleton during loading

tasks.name: Add responsive table wrapper

action.target: Horizontal scroll wrapper for mobile responsiveness

tasks.purpose: Enable horizontal scrolling on mobile devices for wide table

constraints: Table component already wraps in overflow-auto div
Verify mobile behavior with DevTools responsive mode
May need min-width on table cells if content compresses

tasks.input_state: Table is integrated and displays on desktop
tasks.output_state: Table scrolls horizontally on mobile viewports (< 768px) while maintaining readability
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Table is fully usable on 375px viewport with horizontal scroll, no text truncation
tasks.verification_command: pnpm dev && test with browser DevTools responsive mode at 375px width

tasks.name: Add component unit tests
tasks.purpose: Verify table renders correctly in all states (empty, populated, with various data)

constraints: Test status badges render with correct variants

tasks.input_state: PresentationOutlineTable component is complete and integrated
tasks.output_state: Test file exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/__tests__/presentation-outline-table.test.tsx with 5+ test cases
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All tests pass with pnpm --filter web test:unit -- presentation-outline-table
